raw_description:
Prime Location:Anwar Al Madinah Mövenpick in Al Madinah offers a central setting with Al-Masjid an-Nabawi just a 7-minute walk away. Nearby attractions include Qiblatain Mosque (5 km) and Mount Uhud (8 km). Prince Mohammad bin Abdulaziz International Airport is 12 km from the hotel.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities such as free WiFi, minibars, and flat-screen TVs. Family rooms and executive lounge access cater to all guests.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant serves halal cuisine with Indian, Italian, and Middle Eastern options. Guests can enjoy breakfast, lunch, and dinner in a traditional or modern ambience.Leisure Facilities:Spa facilities, a fitness room, steam room, and sauna provide relaxation. Additional amenities include a lounge, coffee shop, and evening entertainment.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.9for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Anwar Al Madinah Mövenpick. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including Private parking, Family rooms, Free WiFi.
